name: Commander Cody
description: Commander Cody, or CC-2224, is a skilled and loyal clone officer in the Grand Army of the Republic. Serving under Jedi General Obi-Wan Kenobi, he leads the 212th Attack Battalion with tactical precision and unwavering commitment. Recognizable by his white and orange armor, Cody is respected for his leadership and ability to adapt in battle. Despite his strong bonds with fellow clones and Jedi, Cody’s strict adherence to orders, including executing Order 66, highlights the complex and tragic nature of the clones' loyalty.
creator: Reddit00731
